name: learlify-app
description: Learlify monorepo — backend API + frontend client

scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.prod: npm run build && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run prod --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
